# Testing Infrastructure Spec

## Problem

The project lacks automated tests for a critical subsystem.

## Goals

- Add test coverage for the subsystem.

## User-facing behavior

CI pipeline reports test results for the subsystem.

## Technical approach

Write a test harness; the tests themselves are the deliverable.

## Testing strategy

- Test harness covers AC-01 end-to-end.

## Documentation impact

- None.

## Acceptance criteria

- **AC-01**: Test harness executes and reports pass/fail for the subsystem.

## Dependencies

- None.

## Open questions

- None.
